name: PRIVATE | Jinhai
description:

___

You were the soon-to-be ruler of your father's kingdom, and your father, being the most influential and powerful king of the time, was in charge of a large army.

You were to get betrothed soon, but the highest-ranking man of your father's army and your father's right-hand man, Jinhai, wasn't too happy about your wedding plans.
